Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: The amount of damage this object can receive before breaking. -1 means it will never break from damage.

Fields.Name: Defense
Fields.Description: The threshold compared against AtkParam field atkObj. If object damage surpasses object defense, the object will take damage. Otherwise, no damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Collide with Camera
Fields.Description: If ON, a camera will collide with this object.

Fields.Name: Destroy on Player Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, this object can be destroyed when collided with by a player.

Fields.Name: External Textures: Map ID
Fields.Description: The map ID of the TPF in which to source the external textures this object uses (if it uses them).

Fields.Name: Has Destruction Animation
Fields.Description: If ON, this object will use a destruction animation when destroyed.

Fields.Name: Destruction: Animation ID (Max)
Fields.Description: The maximum ID in the animation range to use for object destruction for this object.

Fields.Name: Material ID
Fields.Description: The material to use when this object is hit, determines the visual effect and sound that occurs. -1 means it will inherit the material used for the collision it belongs to.

Fields.Name: Collide with Projectiles
Fields.Description: If ON, projectiles with isPenetrate enabled will collide with this object.
